title: pilosella fulviseta
intro: Pilosella fulviseta, also known as the red-pouched mouse-ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella fulviseta include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Pilosella fulviseta often include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to support skin health and promote wound recovery.
